message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

title create file, add, reset, delete

actor "User" as user
package "GIT" {
    participant "Working dir" as working_dir
    participant "Stage" as stage
    database "History" as history
}

note right of GIT: jalbertomr.blogspot.com

box "create file2, add, reset, delete" #white
    user -> working_dir : create file2
    activate working_dir
    note right of working_dir: file2 created
    
    working_dir -> stage : git add file2
    activate stage
    note right of stage: file2 created
    
    stage -> working_dir : git [ reset | reset file2 | reset HEAD file2 ]
    deactivate stage
    note right of working_dir: file2 created
    
    working_dir --> user : delete file2
    deactivate working_dir
end box

@enduml
```
